titleStmt.title: SII 26.559: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 559. (A.R. No. 529 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Parākramapāṇḍyadēva Ś 1408, •••• 20 (Paraº Kulaśēkhara) ba. 7, Thursday, Pūśam = 1486 A.D., October 19. The Month was Aippaśi.

summary.p: This inscription is in Tamil and Grantha characters. It is damaged in some places and is incomplete.

It refers to the building of the temple of Viśvanātha with all its shrines like the central shrine, arddha-maṇḍapa, āvaraṇa (i.e., prākāra) and gōpura, in Dakshiṇa-kāśi (i.e., Teṉkāśi) on the northern bank of Chitranadi in Teṉṉārnāḍu, and to the provision made for the worship of the god Viśvanātha and other deities. It records a gift of a house-site as maḍappuṟam and maṭha to a certain sanyāsi (ascetic) named Prāṇānanda of Paṉaiyūr of the (Bhrerivāḷar ?) Parishad, for service of supervising the various daily and special services and worship in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu saṇḍāryyametat sattama samasta suramaulibhi śāsanama viśvanādhasya śamabhorjjayati śāśvanam Adicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam śakābdam Āyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Eṭṭiṉ meṟcellā niṉṟa nam kumāran parākramapāṇḍya deva
Irupatām tiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu saptamiyum brahasvativāramum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ bhrarivāḷar parikṣaiyil sannyāsikaḷil paṉaiyūril praṇānanda sanyāsikku teṉṉāri nāṭṭu citranadiuttaratirattu dakṣaṇa kāśiyil mu
nam Ālaiyam garbhbhagraham Upānādi sdhuvipayyun=tamum Audtha maṇḍapam mutalāna parivāra Ālaiyaṅkaḷum Āparaṇamum gopurān=tam Āka Uḷḷa paṇikaḷum ceyvittu nam Arccanaikkum nam parivāra Arccanaikkum nitya �
m pala vakaikaḷum tantu naṭantu potukiṟa Itu rakṣittut tarumpaṭi sannyāsi kaḷaiyuṅ kaṟpittu naṭantu potukiṟa Ivarkaḷi Uṭaṉ kūṭi rakṣittuk koṇṭu potumpaṭi Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku taṉakku maṭamum kuṭuttu maṭappuṟamum viṭumpaṭi nam kumā
ṟkuvitiyāṉa tuṭṭarāyira kaṇṭaṉ perunteruvil maṭattukku viṭṭa Irupattu Añcu muḻattiṉāl maṉai Oṉṟukkup perunāṉku Elkaiyāvatu kiḻelkai naṭuvil timainārācattukku meṟku teṉ Elkai Āṟṟukku vaṭakku mel Elkai brāhmaṇar � Incomplete and Mutilated at the end.
Digital edition of SII 26.559 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
